user.title: SolarTouch LAN — Connect to your inverter
user.description:
Enter the local network details for your SolarMax Onyx inverter.

{cloud_warning}

data.name: Inverter Name
data.daily_cloud_sync: Pause daily at 23:45 to allow cloud sync (6 min)

data_description.name: A friendly name for this inverter (e.g. My Solar Inverter)
data_description.host: The local IP address of your inverter (e.g. 192.168.1.2)
data_description.connection_mode: Standby mode is recommended if you use the SolarTouch app
data_description.daily_cloud_sync: Lets the inverter send one daily data point to cloudinverter.net at end of day

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the inverter. Check the IP address and that port 502 is reachable.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
